SCOPE=
SHELL_RC=0
RC=0
IMPACT=prod_affecting
REASON=full rebuilds always touch prod-affecting VMs
UNKNOWN=
---
SCOPE=control-plane
SHELL_RC=0
RC=0
IMPACT=shared_control_plane
REASON=control-plane scope targets shared VMs: gitlab, cicd, pbs
UNKNOWN=
---

SHELL_RC=0
RC=0
IMPACT=prod_affecting
REASON=data-plane scope includes prod data-plane VMs
UNKNOWN=
---

REASON=scope includes shared control-plane targets: gitlab

UNKNOWN=

SHELL_RC=0
RC=0

UNKNOWN=

SCOPE=vm=cicd,pbs

REASON=scope includes shared control-plane targets: cicd, pbs
UNKNOWN=

RC=1

REASON=scope includes unknown module name(s)
UNKNOWN=unknownrole
